mnemonics: JAM: Java Annotations Matter - Use //, /* */, and /** */ for different comment types
keyPoints: Single-line comments start with // and extend to the end of the line
Multi-line comments are enclosed between /* and */
Javadoc comments begin with /** and end with */ and are used for documentation generation
commonMistakes: Nesting multi-line comments (/* */ inside another /* */) which causes compilation errors
Forgetting that // comments only affect the current line, leading to unintended code execution on subsequent lines
